title: TEEN TRIPLE P - 211info
text: PARENTING NOW TEEN TRIPLE P Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers online program for practical parenting strategies and tools to navigate the challenges of raising teenagers. 86 Centennial Loop Eugene, OR 97401 Eligibility: Parentes with children 10-16 years old Hours: Online Email (541) 484-5316 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 484-5316 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment, Visit website FEES: Varies by service LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: State of Oregon TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: LTD Bus #13 stops nearby twice per hour. Parking is available in a lot behind the building or on the street. Services: Parenting Skills Classes * Parents of Teens Other Services Offered At This Location: HUMAN REPRODUCTION - BABY CONNECTION INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - HEALTHY FAMILIES OREGON INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - PARENTING GROUPS INFORMATION SERVICES - PARENTING RESOURCES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
